_about: Retrieval gold for the embedding eval. `queries` map a free-text search to the notes that should rank high. `related_pairs` give each note its curated related neighbours (used as self-queries for related-link precision). `duplicates` are near-identical pairs for detection-rate; synthetic text pairs are clearly marked. All referenced note paths are added to the embedding corpus automatically.
